name: Oreterra Metals Corp.
description: Oreterra Metals Corp. is a Canadian junior exploration company focused on the acquisition and development of high-potential mineral properties in British Columbia. The company's primary focus is on the Affton Project, a copper-gold porphyry target located in the prolific Quesnel Terrane near Kamloops. Oreterra leverages advanced geological modeling and historical data to identify underexplored opportunities within established mining districts. By applying modern exploration techniques to strategic land packages, the company aims to create significant shareholder value through the discovery of economic metal deposits essential for global electrification and industrial growth.
